title: Tasman Holiday Parks - North Star
description: Modest resort near a beach, offering a spa & a water park, plus a casual restaurant & a bar.
address: 1 Tweed Coast Rd, Hastings Point NSW 2489, Australia
hotelDescription:
A 4-minute walk from Hastings Point Beach, this low-key resort set in 10-hectare gardens next to the Cudgen Nature Reserve is also 25 km from Gold Coast Airport.
 Accommodations include functional cabins and dorms, plus chalets and apartments with kitchens, living rooms & TVs. Some upgraded quarters provide patios or balconies, and whirlpool tubs. There are also tent pitches.
 Amenities include an outdoor pool with water slides and a hot tub, plus a tennis court, a kid's playground and a BBQ area. There's also a game room, and a spa with an indoor pool, as well as an informal restaurant, a bar and a convenience store. Parking is available.
